# Prioritized result display (2025-12-12 21:01Z)

_**User (2025-12-12 15:13Z)**_

okay, now let's look at the results, attached are the 4 potential results, if user picked more first option in the question set, then the result is result1, similarly, more second option, result2, more 3rd option, result3, more 4nd option, result 4, if it's a tie, then result1>result2>result3>result4, show the result with highest priority, you can find the background image in the images folder, update the text style to match the design mockup@images

0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 25px;\n    background-color: #e1e3e5;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: relative;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    min-width: 48px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 12px;\n    top: 50%;\n    transform: margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 8px;\n    width: min(360px, 100%);\n    align-items: center;\n    position: relative;\n    margin-left: auto;\n overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: flex-start;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 14px;\n    padding: 54px 52px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 55%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 85%);\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.8rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    line-height: 1.15;\n    margin: 0;\n    text-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n   "contentsAfterEdit": "// Store user answers\nlet answers = [];\n\n// Result data mapped to most-picked option (1-4)\nconst results = [\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-1.jpg',\n        title: \"You're Proudly Frugal!\",\n        description: \"You've got everyday efficiency down to a science.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-2.jpg',\n        title: \"You're Safely Cooking!\",\n        description: \"You keep your kitchen smart and your savings steady.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-3.jpg',\n        title: \"You're Seriously Saving!\",\n        description: \"You love saving big without spending a thing.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-4.jpg',\n        title: \"You're Carefully Comfortable!\",\n        description: \"You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.\"\n    }\n];\n\n// Initialize the quiz\nfunction startQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    showStep('question-1');\n    setProgress(0);\n}\n\n// Show a specific step\nfunction showStep(stepId) {\n    // Hide all steps\n    const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');\n    steps.forEach(step =&gt; {\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n\n        // Move the progress section inside the current question container\n        const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n        const questionContainer = step.querySelector('.question-container');\n        if (progressSection &amp;&amp; questionContainer) {\n            questionContainer.appendChild(progressSection);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    // Hide progress on landing and result pages\n    if (progressSection) {\n        if (stepId === 'landing' || stepId === 'result') {\n            progressSection.classList.add('hidden');\n        } else {\n            progressSection.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Animate progress to a target percentage and resolve when the bar finishes\nfunction animateProgressTo(percentage) {\n    return new Promise((resolve) =&gt; {\n        const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n        if (!progressFill) {\n            setProgress(percentage);\n            resolve();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const onEnd = (event) =&gt; {\n            if (event.propertyName === 'width') {\n                progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n                clearTimeout(fallback);\n                resolve();\n            }\n        };\n\n        const fallback = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n            progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n            resolve();\n        }, 450);\n\n        progressFill.addEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n        setProgress(percentage);\n    });\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        const isLastQuestion = currentQuestionNum &gt;= 4;\n        const nextStepId = isLastQuestion ? null : &#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;;\n        const targetPercent = isLastQuestion ? 100 : currentQuestionNum * 25;\n\n        animateProgressTo(targetPercent).then(() =&gt; {\n            if (isLastQuestion) {\n                showResult();\n            } else {\n                showStep(nextStepId);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n}\n\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Count selections per option (1-4)\n    const counts = [0, 0, 0, 0];\n    answers.forEach((answer) =&gt; {\n        if (answer &amp;&amp; counts[answer - 1] !== undefined) {\n            counts[answer - 1] += 1;\n        }\n    });\n\n    // Find the option with the highest count; tie-breaker priority 1 &gt; 2 &gt; 3 &gt; 4\n    let bestIndex = 0;\n    counts.forEach((count, idx) =&gt; {\n        if (count &gt; counts[bestIndex]) {\n            bestIndex = idx;\n        }\n    });\n\n    const result = results[bestIndex];\n    \n    // Update result page\n    const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');\n    const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n    const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n    \n    if (resultImage) {\n        resultImage.src = result.image;\n        resultImage.alt = result.title;\n    }\n    if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n    if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;\n    \n    // Show result page\n    showStep('result');\n}\n\n// Restart the quiz\nfunction restartQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    \n    // Reset all option selections\n    const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Disable all next buttons\n    const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');\n    allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {\n        button.disabled = true;\n    });\n    \n    // Start from landing page and reset progress\n    setProgress(0);\n    showStep('landing');\n}\n\n// Initialize progress bars on page load\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateProgressForStep('landing');\n});\n\n"
}
```

transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    animation: fadeInUp 240ms ease;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    min-height: var(--option-text-height);\n    height: var(--option-text-height);\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 25px;\n    background-color: #e1e3e5;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: relative;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    min-width: 48px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 12px;\n    top: 50%;\n    transform: translateY(-50%);\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: white;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    pointer-events: none;\n    text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 8px;\n    width: min(360px, 100%);\n    align-items: center;\n    position: relative;\n    margin-left: auto;\n    margin-right: auto;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: flex-start;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 14px;\n    padding: 54px 52px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 55%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 85%);\n}\n\n.result-overlay.right-align {\n    align-items: flex-end;\n    text-align: right;\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.8rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    line-height: 1.15;\n    margin: 0;\n    text-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 1.25rem;\n    margin: 0 0 22px;\n    text-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);\n    line-height: 1.45;\n    max-width: 520px;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n        padding: 20px;\n    }\n\n    /* Let text bars grow naturally on small screens to avoid clipping */\n    .option-text {\n        height: auto;\n        min-height: 88px;\n    }\n}\n\n\n.card-link{\n    color: var(--ppl-electric-orange);\n    text-decoration: none;\n}"

      {
        "diffString": "      const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n      const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n+     const resultOverlay = document.querySelector('.result-overlay');\n      \n      if (resultImage) {\n          resultImage.src = result.image;\n          resultImage.alt = result.title;\n      }\n+     if (resultOverlay) {\n+         resultOverlay.classList.toggle('right-align', bestIndex === 3);\n+     }\n      if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n      if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;",

  "resultForModel": "Success. Updated the following files:\nM /Users/37730/Documents/ppl-questionare/script.js",
  "contentsAfterEdit": "// Store user answers\nlet answers = [];\n\n// Result data mapped to most-picked option (1-4)\nconst results = [\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-1.jpg',\n        title: \"You’re Carefully Comfortable!\",\n        description: \"You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-2.jpg',\n        title: \"You’re Seriously Saving!\",\n        description: \"You love saving big without spending a thing.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-3.jpg',\n        title: \"You’re Proudly Frugal!\",\n        description: \"You’ve got everyday efficiency down to a science.\"\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-4.jpg',\n        title: \"You’re Safely Cooking!\",\n        description: \"You keep your kitchen smart and your savings steady.\"\n    }\n];\n\n// Initialize the quiz\nfunction startQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    showStep('question-1');\n    setProgress(0);\n}\n\n// Show a specific step\nfunction showStep(stepId) {\n    // Hide all steps\n    const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');\n    steps.forEach(step =&gt; {\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n\n        // Move the progress section inside the current question container\n        const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n        const questionContainer = step.querySelector('.question-container');\n        if (progressSection &amp;&amp; questionContainer) {\n            questionContainer.appendChild(progressSection);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    // Hide progress on landing and result pages\n    if (progressSection) {\n        if (stepId === 'landing' || stepId === 'result') {\n            progressSection.classList.add('hidden');\n        } else {\n            progressSection.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Animate progress to a target percentage and resolve when the bar finishes\nfunction animateProgressTo(percentage) {\n    return new Promise((resolve) =&gt; {\n        const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n        if (!progressFill) {\n            setProgress(percentage);\n            resolve();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const onEnd = (event) =&gt; {\n            if (event.propertyName === 'width') {\n                progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n                clearTimeout(fallback);\n                resolve();\n            }\n        };\n\n        const fallback = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n            progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n            resolve();\n        }, 450);\n\n        progressFill.addEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n        setProgress(percentage);\n    });\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        const isLastQuestion = currentQuestionNum &gt;= 4;\n        const nextStepId = isLastQuestion ? null : &#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;;\n        const targetPercent = isLastQuestion ? 100 : currentQuestionNum * 25;\n\n        animateProgressTo(targetPercent).then(() =&gt; {\n            if (isLastQuestion) {\n                showResult();\n            } else {\n                showStep(nextStepId);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n}\n\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Count selections per option (1-4)\n    const counts = [0, 0, 0, 0];\n    answers.forEach((answer) =&gt; {\n        if (answer &amp;&amp; counts[answer - 1] !== undefined) {\n            counts[answer - 1] += 1;\n        }\n    });\n\n    // Find the option with the highest count; tie-breaker priority 1 &gt; 2 &gt; 3 &gt; 4\n    let bestIndex = 0;\n    counts.forEach((count, idx) =&gt; {\n        if (count &gt; counts[bestIndex]) {\n            bestIndex = idx;\n        }\n    });\n\n    const result = results[bestIndex];\n    \n    // Update result page\n    const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');\n    const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n    const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n    const resultOverlay = document.querySelector('.result-overlay');\n    \n    if (resultImage) {\n        resultImage.src = result.image;\n        resultImage.alt = result.title;\n    }\n    if (resultOverlay) {\n        resultOverlay.classList.toggle('right-align', bestIndex === 3);\n    }\n    if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n    if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;\n    \n    // Show result page\n    showStep('result');\n}\n\n// Restart the quiz\nfunction restartQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    \n    // Reset all option selections\n    const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Disable all next buttons\n    const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');\n    allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {\n        button.disabled = true;\n    });\n    \n    // Start from landing page and reset progress\n    setProgress(0);\n    showStep('landing');\n}\n\n// Initialize progress bars on page load\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateProgressForStep('landing');\n});\n\n"
}
```
